description: Two lines of a state document probably, based on format. Very large. But might also something poetical, referring to love: ḥālī yattaṣilhā l-hawā wa-l-maḥabba wa-ʿindahumā tasquṭ al-munāẓara.... Reused on verso for Hebrew literary text.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
